title: Snow Scoopers
body:
Ever wanted a mod that overhauls snowballs? No? well too bad, you are getting that.

 

Snow Scoopers adds multiple new snowballs, a snow scooper and upgrades for it.  Which are all craftable after getting your first iron ingot :D

As of now, the mod has 15 snowballs, ranging from basic ones that give effects to overpowered ones that send foes flying.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1d36905d00cd88a8074a12d26e7d15a0da0768.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b9d796019cb319f5d42d52fb6af2663be5e68b2.png)
